title: Metrics
description: Lightweight live telemetry from a plugin instance. Pushed at ~2-4 Hz from the worker thread. The slice carries only momentary LUFS; additional fields will be added without breaking existing consumers.

timestamp.description: Plugin wall-clock at capture time, milliseconds since Unix epoch.

metrics.description: Open container so new metrics can be added without bumping the schema major version.

lufsMomentary.description: Momentary loudness per ITU-R BS.1770 / EBU R128 over the last 400 ms. Null when the window has not filled yet or when the input is silent (below -100 LUFS).
